question: Who will serve as vice president under the winner of Colombia's 2026 presidential election?

openrouter:anthropic/claude-sonnet-5.answer:
Abelardo de la Espriella won Colombia's 2026 presidential runoff on June 21, 2026, defeating Iván Cepeda. His running mate — and thus the incoming vice president — is **José Manuel Restrepo Abondano**, a former Colombian Finance Minister (under President Iván Duque) and former rector of the EIA university, who was announced as De la Espriella's vice-presidential candidate in March 2026 ahead of the election.

Sources:
- https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/2026_Colombian_presidential_election
- https://es.wikipedia.org/wiki/Jos%C3%A9_Manuel_Restrepo_Abondano
- https://www.semana.com/politica/articulo

openrouter:openai/gpt-5.6-sol.answer: **José Manuel Restrepo**, a former finance minister, will serve as vice president under President-elect **Abelardo de la Espriella** for Colombia’s 2026–2030 term. ([The Guardian](https://www.theguardian.com/world/2026/jun/21/far-right-millionaire-abelardo-de-la-espriella-wins-colombia-presidential-runoff), [Edelman](https://www.edelman.com/insights/colombia-2026-2030-presidential-elections-results-first-100-days))
